name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: The right side of history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We're going to keep fighting for our beliefs and what the Voting Rights Act stands for, no matter what the Supreme Court says, because we're confident that we're on the right side of history and we will prevail.
Team, fuel our efforts with $35 or more today to help activate and turn out every voter to win at the ballot box in these midterm elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051226_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Mother Jones: Blame John Roberts for Destroying the Voting Rights Act [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051226_3&amount=25]
Team: Louisiana v. Callais is based on a lie . It also represents the culmination of John Roberts' decades-long mission to end the Voting Rights Act.
First, the lie: Writing for the majority in the Supreme Court's decision gutting the Voting Rights Act, Justice Alito declared that " the racial gap in voter registration and turnout has largely disappeared ." That's simply not true, and Trump's Department of Justice has admitted to the press, after the fact, that it used alternative measures to write the report that Alito cited.
In truth, amongst underrepresented communities in comparison to their peers:
➜ 2020 voter turnout was 14% lower.
➜ 2022 voter turnout was 23% lower.
➜ 2024 voter turnout was 17% lower.
These numbers represent actual people – predominantly voters of color, young people, and women – whose voices are being systematically pushed out of our elections. The gap Justice Alito says has "largely disappeared" is real, ongoing, and growing.
Team: In the wake of the Supreme Court’s ruling, we’re redoubling our efforts to ensure every eligible American has a voice in our democracy, but we need your support. Will you chip in $35 right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051226_3&amount=35]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051226_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051226_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051226_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051226_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051226_3&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051226_3&amount=35]
As for John Roberts? He's written or joined the majority on every major case the VRA has faced -- 2013's Shelby County v. Holder , 2021's Brnovich v. DNC , and now 2026's Louisiana v. Callais .
His self-appointed mission to end the Voting Rights Act started in the 1980s , when he was just a young lawyer working in Ronald Reagan's Justice Department. He fought Congress on behalf of Reagan's administration, essentially claiming the VRA was affirmative action for voting rights. A bipartisan Congress in the 1980's disagreed, overwhelmingly reauthorizing the VRA and strengthening it over Roberts' objections.
Fast forward to his confirmation hearings for Chief Justice, when we called the VRA a "settled question," then, upon being confirmed, immediately got to work ending it . He wrote the majority opinion for Shelby County v. Holder , knocking the first leg out from under the VRA and setting the stage for a decade-plus of further challenges.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Roberts Court held this case over from last year. He's accomplished his mission to take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. The VRA no longer stands in the way of white majorities locking racial minorities out of elected office through race-based gerrymandering.
This is the fight of our lives, Team, and we need you with us. Pitch in $35 or however much you can to help us fulfill the mission of the VRA by informing and turning out every voter possible for the upcoming elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051226_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051226_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051226_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: The Democrats
subject: Looking for 500 Pennsylvania Democrats:
body:
---
Derek, **If you’re a Pennsylvania Democrat, this message is for you:** We’re rapidly approaching our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re counting on our team of nationwide grassroots supporters to help us reach our $300k goal to help us continue our fight to win the midterms. **To reach our goal, we need 500 Pennsylvania Democrats to[**chip in $7 to the DNC today. **[CHIP IN TODAY](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-mid-month?amount=7&refcode=em_20260512_7098_fr&refcode2=7098_22930333__NQ9gc&akid=7098%2E22930333%2E_NQ9gc)** That might seem like a lot of people, but if everyone receiving this email chipped in, we’d meet our goal in no time. We’ll be completely honest: To win races across the country this year, we’ll need to distribute a huge number of resources to the candidates who need them most. The investments we can make will be determined _right now_ , not in the weeks and months right before the election. The money we raise now will determine how many doors Democratic candidates knock. It will determine how many voters we can reach.**That’s why our mid-month fundraising deadline matters, and it’s why we’re asking supporters like you for your help.** [**So, can you chip in $7 today to help us meet our mid-month goal today? We will put your donation to work immediately:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-mid-month?amount=7&refcode=em_20260512_7098_fr&refcode2=7098_22930333__NQ9gc&akid=7098%2E22930333%2E_NQ9gc) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-mid-month?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260512_7098_fr&refcode2=7098_22930333__NQ9gc&akid=7098%2E22930333%2E_NQ9gc)**

name: Brad Raffensperger
subject: One week. One final push.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRAD FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
This is the moment that will decide Georgia's future.

| | | | | [|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/x038OnHZtCw?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)
| |
One week from today, Georgia voters will decide the future of our state.
And while my opponents spend millions of dollars tearing each other apart on television, I’m spending every day traveling Georgia, meeting with voters, and fighting for the issues that matter to hardworking families.
**Because I’m running for the right reasons.**
I’m not in this race for power, personal ambition, or political games. I’m running because I love Georgia — and I believe our state needs serious, conservative leadership focused on results.
**The truth is, we are being wildly outspent.**
But despite the millions being spent by my opponents, **we are still in the thick of this fight** because of grassroots supporters like you.
Now we enter the final week.
**This is the moment that will decide everything.**
If we’re going to keep our ads on the air, reach undecided voters, and finish strong, **I need your help right now.**
[**Will you rush a contribution today to help put us over the top?**](https://us.list-manage.com/gEGL8cZtIZ4?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)
Every dollar matters in these final days.
Thank you for standing with me, believing in our campaign, and fighting for Georgia’s future.
Onward.
---
|
---
| | Brad Raffensperger
---
| | **IMPORTANT DATES**
* **April 27 – May 15** – Early voting period
* **May 8** – Deadline to request an absentee ballot
* **May 19** – Primary Election Day (polls open 7am–7pm)

**Voters can find their polling place, registration status, and more at:**[****](https://us.list-manage.com/OXSjjoml87s?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)[**www.mvp.sos.ga.gov**](https://us.list-manage.com/Dqk01o9BpG2?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)

subject: $16.48 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eileen for Colorado
body:

Peter,

I’m reaching out because I just saw something in our internal data that simply does not make sense to me. Your profile was recently flagged and marked as **_["No Longer Supportive"](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=19bd95ea816d403cabc0893cec279153&_e=OTI6plB1XtqdufioOpgahUGRzJqpmG30XW5mxoXuDRQE5QvOzIM_wwJBhdPHpoRJ83OaE6vtgQcKCJwSrR5J4oF1ggikRQgTzs_dQ4F9tksqkSmPgaC-Xcjjcu9vkpnd1YOrARieCAW13WTxz4ujiKMD82B7Y_Ve4TBS-ewg16n1hsoQPfqmy4z7CC76CzmMp6t_0D9YwnCwSRPqeeZ_mAVYKPdo-Y6oloZuUgEELJ53Cm4W3dmmyAn4etsxtkz4CHEBpm_LT5VVLgFzhMfo6Qb68KBvrxMcgBPhxHDKKej7ZthYG07PGIHzsHz94TkhS4Db8bclxHpQh6ehbus0PCN3fVPnlYBW9KTbh5YyRHfZwL0OWrBMpAIFmFdBB3ZuBZQ8T2bDG19Oagi8S626QtVu6mHleFq8S4jjMnwSWqJ6ZE_6OD1UXHFw0JrSng1MABfmPPvwlP0isnym8rpJzkKFqFXC50Cif1P56QglXNjc5hF3NUrf1Ck2dfvMGkSJqn7xsqWsNVoWnnGB7n2SY6CgJGSREN7Qg4NVJW9xqbMK65kadvR0fyb8Too8Ic0xx_BFztepTyMJLOKccZFkjhujpjyPYRt5S8tRHuOiBjjE2MRFF8fejp03MbeB2znxylsWIRJu8z6scQDAMwBIQo-2Aukf08gOqeJHveVNrotq6aqi-NmhQUtTi3LHnL0_FpRa4j2EYlXxDwA1xNEgZTmw1rf1MNAtqHj_DTxjur-XwM3MnyZfUMt9FZ-D8OiiMjk0SmRv_OP-E7fFi7K6bEYYz0WW-LuVbvB5AywDNhrnjkuP6SB1gUkUofLWtWFvAfkrFU6r0qPxBCoofDaO2dst0FlauEPYLGEJNar3AgxcPhC_vnMjCgrpWeVl6AyS) _**of President Trump and the America First movement. **I’ll be honest:** I was __deeply concerned__ when I saw that. You have always been someone President Trump and I could count on, which is why I _**immediately**_ stepped in and asked my team to hold your file for a manual review. I refused to believe you’d walk away from the President now. [**But until I hear from you, I have no way of knowing if this is a terrible mistake or if we are losing one of our best patriots.**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=19bd95ea816d403cabc0893cec279153&_e=OTI6plB1XtqdufioOpgahUGRzJqpmG30XW5mxoXuDRQE5QvOzIM_wwJBhdPHpoRJ83OaE6vtgQcKCJwSrR5J4oF1ggikRQgTzs_dQ4F9tksqkSmPgaC-Xcjjcu9vkpnd1YOrARieCAW13WTxz4ujiKMD82B7Y_Ve4TBS-ewg16n1hsoQPfqmy4z7CC76CzmMp6t_0D9YwnCwSRPqeeZ_mAVYKPdo-Y6oloZuUgEELJ53Cm4W3dmmyAn4etsxtkz4CHEBpm_LT5VVLgFzhMfo6Qb68KBvrxMcgBPhxHDKKej7ZthYG07PGIHzsHz94TkhCz-ISEQZxGX0OCfW8kIRRvX7CpWaWOw3TABhDicKZQmEkS_qFUkSb6u-EB3o_UMsqdUmIUgfNXAnz9Smtel1sg8Yk6IivLQjddWF-1Eh_SvF2uc4ENuefqCc7K3Ba6p4rnkmknCCnOU14EJcc4l4cucQTzoghfxky-7R3G1cajHr2kqwDL2EEEN3DYI42sQI5_B0Eh1cfo_M0V8M7BPkpHZ8OdYDjNipHJfDixVwDCtbEZ1L7D6DUkVTSUXmw0OHqZfCxnRz38jvThKmAPK17JlnNdpHmEikpYgewLYugOr2hvDJgh5KRJqRluK4e9_c7Pv4vM2D9wR-q9zPEb0mW3RB00o0i5ALTafNk_SY817AVICH80YFAsoSrVFb8Zf8riuVxsmm3VMdf89S1nXyzmi074mdQ2XZxQ-sBMpdmkyTHxCT6NCWI0MgKu-X_0G8dcgEGZMqsFLDV3q8yPvnM6h_sGUmoeDGYP6OkejOM_2nkU3heQc6Qm4xKuiEgdvwaAdKy5ZY0RmrxzCZNC5lzXvWJjcy9EMw50LPQXT7qVaJE9qjAGZaCDyPkSHblUVA) Please, take sixty seconds to verify your true status and correct the record before your file is finalized.

I'm counting on you to set the record straight.
---
God Bless, Senator Katie Britt
---
| | [](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=19bd95ea816d403cabc0893cec279153&_e=OTI6plB1XtqdufioOpgahUGRzJqpmG30XW5mxoXuDRQE5QvOzIM_wwJBhdPHpoRJolILULtoTfDlXXyAmsh-nuFHPSmvDQsGYYtvw51K_axqS5kDFvUFl_02JPXe0YEVjNAYTC01G9dv4e8jBH9lQRpu-8OIZYZR7YbYE4qvaNr8COaIPWdfKl4Bi78n-2G5NGdzQOOgHnuf3tCmEv5KdoAEcsSSe_Tgl01k10f_sDKVo4h11HD_nuNcwYRSncKPN05_gl5SiXd7Lm2ENU-OQvaV3EhA4alFjx-q0YF8p8T3kZ1Ib0jgzVphZnjhGzcnBS553T8W-f9Q1F78yjD3fzqkAjTrfF7h1ODRY18XQIO2iO-guBjECLo91jiyvCzD_C1XXoW6eR8juztmhwTViFmoNUYHVPH0aTyBfHbzb2OaRFsX5wJdz2Z89bg1R6jbqcVGlt9N2fghRYPkQPqZbpniSOnl6mitJ5n34Z9Qn7M%3D)
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
---

name: Team Hong
subject: We have yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
And a new office in Madison!
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260512-2807)
Peter,
Yesterday, we celebrated the grand opening of Team Hong's first campaign office in Madison. This is a space for volunteers and supporters to connect, build community and organize to get Fran elected.
Also: If you've been wanting a yard sign, this is your sign to stop by! We have them available for a suggested donation of $10.
**Address:** 1342 Dewey Ct, Madison
**Hours:** Monday & Tuesday, 9 a.m. to 5 p.m.
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260512.mhGuAu&refcode=em20260512-2807&t=1&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)
Our office will also serve as a mutual aid hub! We're collecting nonperishable food and personal care items, **with drop-off hours on Monday and Tuesday afternoons from 2 to 5 p.m.**
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260512.mhGuAu&refcode=em20260512-2807&t=2&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)
We're entering a serious phase of the primary — AKA, the part where we start spending the serious money it takes to run a statewide campaign. Rent for an office is a big line item, but it's nothing compared to what media and mailers cost.
We know every dollar is precious right now. Trump's war with Iran has gas over $4.40 a gallon and grocery prices climbing.
So many of you have given so generously already, and we're deeply grateful. But now is the time to put even more energy behind Fran — she has gone from wildcard candidate to genuine frontrunner.
[](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260512.mhGuAu&refcode=em20260512-2807&t=3&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)
**[The primary is just 91 days away. Chip in $5, $10, $100 — whatever you can — and help us make better possible.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260512.mhGuAu&refcode=em20260512-2807&t=4&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260512.mhGuAu&amount=5&refcode=em20260512-2807&t=23&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)**
See you in Madison!
— Team Hong
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260512-2807&t=24&refcode2=2807_105371_w6ymkH&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2807%2E105371%2Ew6ymkH)

Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong

name: Steve Hilton
subject: I’m breaking protocol (risky)
body:
I’m writing this from my phone...| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c0c3710d31443ea9ae16a151157c97f&_e=cK1Y1W78vpAgH-gC5WEZ-BI-saQ3YNse9k7m8-CBakAVirnBwJPn6-vgV_tKn7CXQkFZnRRL0CWayYekK5tLTGIfPCDUi0FtA2hvbI2vr4yDiVXkx6wUFBOTyyOtgkh4c54Mv_o__fKmrV-H_zU-Xfl-jcLLLXb3HJcvaDRorKMcpxqXRHb4rqBMRPPyzWJzeyG7dDuhgcjRjSvaYW3Y5svDvlK0xrbD_cUatidHAeLGGBjmptbuxI8HwMU7ttDgKiFGydi1FTKRMU9hU7Vf7w8Zx6rQxIkKZZoYSE46rH4OihuxNp6t9nF1Kn1T66Pnyn7RsO5P5KQ5dia7gdOv2cHl-Hhs0-ZfQ7hqJ3QB2-fnEErNwcIJZYHRmjQ5J0h1O9BSW_LE7qtl10s-sJr3SUXE20zvvlzLJT5l0D3p0-SPj5r8s8YwQO_YCg9u65apHOIxB9OyrligfDk0zmImpe2Qp5n5pZXM7y3JGzdez7M%3D)
---
**Hello Peter , ** _**I am writing this to you directly from the backseat of my car.**_ I just walked out of a meeting with the data team and party leadership, and to be honest, **I am reeling...** What I just saw on that screen changes everything.
---
[ **> CLICK HERE: Read My Note <** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c0c3710d31443ea9ae16a151157c97f&_e=cK1Y1W78vpAgH-gC5WEZ-BI-saQ3YNse9k7m8-CBakAVirnBwJPn6-vgV_tKn7CXQkFZnRRL0CWayYekK5tLTGIfPCDUi0FtA2hvbI2vr4yDiVXkx6wUFBOTyyOtgkh4c54Mv_o__fKmrV-H_zU-Xfl-jcLLLXb3HJcvaDRorKMcpxqXRHb4rqBMRPPyzWJzeyG7dDuhgcjRjSvaYW3Y5svDvlK0xrbD_cUatidHAeLGGBjmptbuxI8HwMU7ttDgKiFGydi1FTKRMU9hU7Vf7w8Zx6rQxIkKZZoYSE46rH4OihuxNp6t9nF1Kn1T66Pnyn7RsO5P5KQ5dia7gdOv2dAMmji1PeHFHpqXwgGY29CWbbvAZha6AGe6TDQIHKmIjAAI2D3M8acf278E1MdGN9uxT0ZlgC0sU-RiSyPqWiYfTWBMo9tm0kkj0idzIENZCACQNCJiC_atRpZmKIzk4dFdmKk4E8JSufDTORNMNmo%3D)
---
My consultants told me to keep this quiet. ** They told me to stick to the script.** But I don’t answer to them. [**I answer to you!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c0c3710d31443ea9ae16a151157c97f&_e=cK1Y1W78vpAgH-gC5WEZ-BI-saQ3YNse9k7m8-CBakAVirnBwJPn6-vgV_tKn7CXQkFZnRRL0CWayYekK5tLTGIfPCDUi0FtA2hvbI2vr4yDiVXkx6wUFBOTyyOtgkh4c54Mv_o__fKmrV-H_zU-Xfl-jcLLLXb3HJcvaDRorKMcpxqXRHb4rqBMRPPyzWJzeyG7dDuhgcjRjSvaYW3Y5svDvlK0xrbD_cUatidHAeLGGBjmptbuxI8HwMU7ttDgKiFGydi1FTKRMU9hU7Vf7w8Zx6rQxIkKZZoYSE46rH4OihuxNp6t9nF1Kn1T66Pnyn7RsO5P5KQ5dia7gdOv2eaXIEW_VPvkzWgZbrZqC7aEUhh130cY_yDBcKZXM1q659D8sWq3HRUNd3RnEKpJDUZU6KFw1VSO77lWozVYg_Lie4RwIZN0VoQHPpoolv3JpNjhe4zRKNEITrZZYCXifsa90BF8BFpzfNv2PFkvBGs%3D)

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

[_**Will you #KeepFloridaWinning?**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=4a1840230ebd4074a8e5f254ea4796c9&_e=JFamcdUn9t-38NKagrte4UeSIwpRNThtMHhf44MasXwB48Tkl-M7lq-P29SW7t4OnYITPa6NyNRhy80mrW980NZqHSn22xD4aMMiR_sTTCbrjhEWecZZd39c8e2Hp117-yMpoG-_C-5aj-7MoiJifyxd8psMGLSl9W9imirdklH45hIszmvqMWnm7I3Wy-MUlIkukj1Q_0pndAZbKfADxSzkMzVQafE-ULA4Dls7QqMPzdNvTdGUE7szsTpynnXOcwAr83fgc533Mz7uglDVZHDWrUfo5tCyK9xtqGtPLfhQs3t56zTCub3kUTOsLnDtPGsND-BJ488QcpZmMbsym8zVSFifNqoAyHVU9gDWcizqKnMXfi0Br2-rkc1E8GUfFtiezPgHaM5nCAIrbgtmxUuyJQP9xZNwpxLdvJDvod6KmkJK-2yussZAmNKdrIYA4nbyTuF_le5A3Ok3qdh49v_I9ZjC1kACA_6Ulxkg02R7IBFD4AKHGbLUj51HdIIB8eUAOHk8VaN2MmOh_PlWf1GvnFJLk-XidMfd_kIB091BozQjz3GbwO42i2MPXb9JjEKSvXSOrwCp4bIZWbIUh1UotI2EiF4QGfF6Zpd8Q7iqH54P7rFqdR1Y25Q-y6w3F7GURpaUVOCz3nDI98cRGQslZ4EMc3cVaVX73KdRhnpbOd7zO4dyNc5EE8M-65jUMj2FuBK0GNiKYBGshJjbap5RtCh9CD6oLU66GxD6a0QkEcTj7FQhsKsoqe_6nDMeCzYIilCQqlxDnDtM7bqEAFrnPEl6LCCc4u-3yBbbPkU%3D)

clean_body: This is where we hold the line. | Fellow American, We have to be honest with you. We are deeply concerned about what’s coming this November — and what it means not just for Florida,but for the entire country. They know if they can crack Florida, they can unravel the conservative movement nationwide. And right now, they’re pouring in millions to make it happen. There are just a handful of key battlegrounds that will decide whether we hold the line — or hand control over to the liberal agenda. Florida is at the center of it all. That’s why we are asking for something simple: Just $1 for each critical battleground we have to defend. Read our internal Florida Battleground Memo, and you’ll see exactly how the Left is planning their takeover — We cannot afford to fall behind. We cannot afford to back down. — Florida GOP Team | About the Republican Party of Florida * The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability. We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America. Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations. | PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA. name: Amy Acton
subject: this is a difficult email to send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2239%2E259176%2EX7yzMl) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2239%2E259176%2EX7yzMl)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.12_Acton-Down-Polls_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2239%2E259176%2EX7yzMl) Peter, I have some tough news, and I wanted you to hear it directly from me: **A brand new poll shows me _one point down_ to my extreme opponent, Vivek Ramaswamy.** We knew this race was razor-thin. And I haven't lost hope yet, because four other recent polls have shown us ahead. [**We're officially in the general election, and I urgently need your support to fight back. That's why my team and I set a goal to raise $200,000 by midnight, and I'm counting on you to help us reach it. Will you please chip in $10 to me and Blue Amp Action now to help take back the lead in this critical election?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.12_Acton-Down-Polls_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2239%2E259176%2EX7yzMl) | [CHIP IN $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10971?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.12_Acton-Down-Polls_B5_F1_S2_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2239%2E259176%2EX7yzMl)
---
Look, here’s what’s going on:
Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible grassroots movement. We’ve traveled to every corner of this state. We broke fundraising records. And against all odds – we took a narrow lead in the polls.
**But then, my billionaire opponent began unloading his massive warchest against us. He wrote his own campaign a check for $25 million. He poured $10 MILLION into ads to soften his extreme image and to spread ugly, baseless attacks against me.**
This will be a toss-up battle all the way to Election Day. Experts say it’ll be the most expensive governor's race in Ohio history.
I’m not a billionaire, Peter. But I’m confident that together — when folks like you chip in $10 or $25 at a time — we can take back our lead and win this race.

Narrative:
On 05-12-2026, I responded to a disturbance at Team Rogers HQ regarding a missed fundraising goal.

Upon arrival, I found the team visibly shaken. Staffers stated that despite our best efforts, we were going to fall short of our fundraising goal.

I was immediately instructed to locate Friend and request urgent backup.

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL I’ve been shot at, blown up, and tested in ways most people never experience. While these lies are annoying and slightly comical, they are a different kind of ugly in this battle for the US Senate.

_**It’s the kind of sleazy politics that makes you wonder how low some people will go just to win.**_

I’ve been in this Minnesota Senate race for roughly a year. I’m still not a household name, but something is clearly shifting. Voters across the state are noticing — _**we’ve now won 13 separate straw polls.**

_[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=439575b7d0ce4f56bf164b9dcee9ea26&_e=dgo8z6o1asSZUwQ0NnUUy0_2dNFua2CjR0YH-eSF0E14Z3EnGH_uhAHlDla4WHg36i876trXwkyswUYPGBdrQglWho4-SgAWBV6ATEJ7yoMxlTEuwVb16y3qemTx-A9w7aXbic6gDXAQMuQOw_Pxcht6x3jjJbgbrQ63CItEGci9OcqjJWWnIhaxNOpJ0p8ZH3XMRibxOA5fDQHX6wKcekY_2cG_llCjxvOxm4YLmsgJ2WHGR0XnKjSVrK0Gjw6BL4s2hi_Lou6HYYGfwk_LQCx7axEmNOa-zdRWBKxkrqV-2VsLVkHrie2QsjOV4CbMaEw73MjDXRar-uM3rCzpjGRpuKUra_pMKQO7DskRTDTNUDoUNquX64orJUzBGJaGVC0LP3gUtgtfzCB8drkv_EKbYjaVQoWOJ_qRfK2o4vCxShANmkNrctp3C5VJ42i981IZTmU_zfLltMB74XZQWx2_Zc2mrM4wuBKqATZNgsDCopnPtUV6TNGe7k60uinqlumEGEqQc2rrnVfrH3R6p5YYqHsN6Ur6Hl7ciol0oiMnuBJAFxdG1LvAdTjPI12QpDKXSb2aOfubLsxvRiHU5xFzmbV7JFCMul2KHyvp9R-Fi-6drVdQVB5VcSbJXvXvBKHVoU628RQY7-CocxdKKhpR7XEDsqMKVhn-VgwD3bwwY2ZE9bLL6NYvr6voOVZ8hwVE9awxdGt499WpgwaK0Q0kBWXzBXgtKFaP2V47T2ckByEj6WxRjLFq00P-w9IN)_ _
**I always figured the attacks would come eventually. I just didn’t expect them to get this personal or this dishonest this quickly.**

Look, I can handle the incoming fire. I’ve taken harder hits in my life. What I can’t accept is watching a critical Senate seat slip away because my opponents would rather sling mud than talk about the future of this country.

_**This seat is too important to let personal attacks decide who serves Minnesota and who helps stop the radical Democratic agenda in Washington.**_

**That’s why I’m asking:[if you can chip in just $5 right now to this people-powered campaign, you’ll help us push back hard and keep the momentum going.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=439575b7d0ce4f56bf164b9dcee9ea26&_e=dgo8z6o1asSZUwQ0NnUUy0_2dNFua2CjR0YH-eSF0E14Z3EnGH_uhAHlDla4WHg36i876trXwkyswUYPGBdrQglWho4-SgAWBV6ATEJ7yoMxlTEuwVb16y3qemTx-A9w7aXbic6gDXAQMuQOw_Pxcht6x3jjJbgbrQ63CItEGci9OcqjJWWnIhaxNOpJ0p8ZH3XMRibxOA5fDQHX6wKcekY_2cG_llCjxvOxm4YLmsgJ2WHGR0XnKjSVrK0Gjw6BL4s2hi_Lou6HYYGfwk_LQFMwLkMSkPTZNjifMPY8e9o5P_FUQz2iedgrDRGiJhArwk89nEEWtwIwpWbXPwKxq9PABn0bJQF2LfVYWhE8ohOsUZFCphmwGe8wHNtoNcRqbyMPqsMPlrKgIM1Oj2ydjdGPYSJmKdgTGMVT7NxRIrO_2G9d0GDAUidAVdOpDLzR0sFTExB527haC7-V0MIBivgF_C7RNHeMjaKPa59aEFVLfkLKluYXS9CfVOdMu50_ALm5E2Gm1Na3xpia3XhcViRTfw_f7VpxjEuhfo_RUjVXeJ1p-awPOXqTMxyTBis6KANW1oYXKgc78TcDPOc0bRmajGW0vzmE9opWwb1mfPgxdh9DfN9W3EKr2J3SfuoufLAAk8ybf8Vdv8EBwWm2VdEGdaT14WqMeJjuXguSElN0PfBCsg9W6IFwzySujNBpmUoYr5th6kQn-HMdAqyPhJ88-RjDBjSDsWbokxzpzBN7uHvCmVB4Y_c0p59DHFgW)**

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/120031/images/Screen%20Shot%202026-01-08%20at%201.35.25%20PM.png]
Is there ANYTHING I can say to get you to split a donation between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild one last time before our end-of-month deadline on Saturday?
What if I told you Mike Johnson just announced a $65 MILLION warchest to buy a Republican House majority?
What if I told you Donald Trump is trying to rig our elections nationwide??
What if I told you we’re falling DANGEROUSLY short of our end-of month deadline? We still need to raise $24,428 TODAY.
These are the most consequential Midterm elections we've faced in years... Health care, cost of living, voting rights -- it's all on the line.
I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to fight with me against these MAGA cowards. CNN says we CAN win back a Democratic House Majority. But to do it, we can’t let up for a single moment or else Trump and Mike Johnson will sense weakness, flood this district with MAGA cash, and drown our hopes of taking back the House for Democrats.
I apologize. I know you’ve heard a lot from me, and I ask a lot of you. But this is quite possibly my most urgent ask yet. If we don’t close this dangerous fundraising gap by SATURDAY AT MIDNIGHT, we could end up handing the House to Trump and giving him the power he craves.
If you care about flipping the House and saving our democracy, rush anything you can afford ASAP, before midnight on Saturday, to Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-conway]
CHIP IN TO MY CAMPAIGN TODAY! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-conway]
I hope you will.
Thank you,
George Conway

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Join Us For The Big Day On Wednesday At San Bruno Mountain!
body:
View this email in your browser (https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=168f13ea4a)

============================================================

Good afternoon!

We’re excited to invite you to the Grand Opening Celebration of the newly improved San Bruno Mountain Day Use Area!

Join San Mateo County Parks, California State Parks, and community members as we celebrate exciting new improvements that make this beautiful outdoor space more welcoming and accessible for everyone.

📅 Wednesday, May 13, 2026
⏰ 11:00 AM
📍 Saddle Area – San Bruno Mountain
555 Guadalupe Canyon Parkway, Brisbane, CA

The improvements include:
✅ ADA-accessible picnic areas
✅ Brand-new restroom facility
✅ Interpretive pavilion & displays
✅ Scenic mountain views
✅ Family-friendly outdoor gathering space

Enjoy a fun community ribbon-cutting celebration, photo opportunities, and the chance to explore one of our county’s most scenic outdoor destinations.

Bring a picnic, enjoy the fresh air, and celebrate this exciting park improvement project with us!

We hope to see you there. Please RSVP to Mike: ** mrichardson@smcgov.org (mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=May%2013th%20Event%20)

David J. Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=168f13ea4a)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=168f13ea4a)

subject: 1,400 people showed up to change the party 🪩

body:
Last week, 1,400 people came together in San Francisco to show what this campaign & movement can become. | | |
---
| Hi friend, Last week’s rally was one of those nights that reminds you what politics is supposed to feel like.

Check out some of the footage:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVrvNwaJ-e3Y_qvd1qEqo3cwusL5S9gZhx-8YqghrX7QTxAMzZIJqUTc9jOggi78HjtGWDCQSd3atPS2Ux9AO4Hhh2duNWSMqCVKguRu0hZZrPh-BS6tDgnDnrP1VfHUguqXy0rECzfO0LQ1xIZoW82mwIjgGZmivnXL8UCcak0eDTeDiCCDTa6ud26BIJFTgGxR-6QMtqLXUcfnTt5OErjc7NH0jKFQgOS6tOol65m_MQpEi2z5wTYHe7OLXSHN_g7UblMIrx9yfxdC9JhpWvs5FF_Q4q-tsSa6O58F6zt1YYfISSiCyX1QU6FJpvorzY7X2i3aHgqHFp_n-8JjAHdRpa2sDnJNWgOdsOrd1MSR/4ql/3M-FzE_4Qqy0FmNnhlapvQ/h0/h001.BLVqLyJ8qWyhnaNHaBXXGGZiiLiIPon4EDrRRT8PAG0)
More than **1,400 people** came together in San Francisco for our Change the Party rally with Hasan Piker, Jamaal Bowman, Elise Joshi, Darializa Avila Chevalier, Melat Kiros, Alexandra Rojas, Angela Gonzales-Torres, and so many people who believe we do not have to accept a Democratic Party that keeps failing to meet the moment.

The energy was incredible. But what mattered most was what it represented.

People are ready for a Democratic Party that actually fights for working people.

People are ready for leaders who take on MAGA with the seriousness and urgency this moment demands.

And people are ready to challenge the corporate Democrats who helped get us here — the leaders who tell us to be patient while costs rise, rights disappear, oligarchs pull the strings, and working people are asked to settle for less every year.

The rally proved we have the people power to change that. Help us turn this energy into a victory on June 2 — **please sign up to a volunteer today.**
[Volunteer »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARQ8xIrmPvasGsp-wbaBSFn3qFpTonANd21eHzJfdWN5-gFy9uQz63QdBG5G5z2oQ01ff2iEVsjkzcKSW2s2QbL3grrdNW5BYKMkVIRinRw8yntUTERb-hYmIMiDZQvloFopTot_FpFI3_Uwy76KkgPCabkIhlrSR8efVoE4IR3br2Y_t36rWKneA1X6etmcsxBEGX22kybQEh6F_6LAq2U8dqZqu48vYag-hw5XLO_3kcvx04azCSRHW3r-N33d_MKhQWu87GBxxk-QdadEhwlAuiVd4c-tSeb1NLRQXt5xPA/4ql/3M-FzE_4Qqy0FmNnhlapvQ/h1/h001.rWL1OoYDFe-9aXz5o9AsiDRfWCXqhyH9PsHBNEKFi_A) A rally, even a big and inspiring one, is only the beginning.

To win this race, we are building the largest field operation and voter contact program San Francisco has ever seen.

We are going to talk to voters everywhere — at their doors, on the phones, over text, at events, and in every neighborhood across this city.

That is what it will take to win this seat. That is what it will take to change the Democratic Party. And that is what it will take to build the kind of politics that can actually defeat MAGA and deliver for working people.

So today, we’re asking you to take the next step: **help power this campaign however you can.**

If you’re ready to volunteer, we need you.
[Volunteer with us »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARQ8xIrmPvasGsp-wbaBSFn3qFpTonANd21eHzJfdWN5-rGOZEqq3pDyDVcRBOXTa-GTwmOqG3bBCW45w9Dx2KoskkCbcs4M-5_Ia7GRWc92roKDEOUXUuI0c6ei55rS_oCs9QbWqPVICUFuYujaEOSZ-t0FfWIvKw-9bp0sOZgIglOeKxZVmnWBTZxQ-h5yIsFb3-k5vJynPSA9u8fNcNnPbjSpHohKnXWhKY3TH0w76X5D_FmeV6SHPuvFqZxYQUGdp-K1AN8pN_MqEgMHDCIOEVo-Deii1EH2mBXS_8r6Nw/4ql/3M-FzE_4Qqy0FmNnhlapvQ/h2/h001.9eqi8v8TFYDDUI1GpzebNy_LsfmhxoGYDMpgO30Zuwg) And if you’re not in San Francisco, or you can’t volunteer right now, please chip in whatever you can to help fund the voter contact program it will take to win.
[Donate to Saikat »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9GgNqQBZQbHGys41Ff66GdRsXl3aU86FUQm8hkp73cPTM_xw2TKJWQ9ecxiJCeWHsxSJmzTBrytFqF9rIFWtCEk-C36owEb4hopRcyf8Xbo0_HuyPgZAIve684n2Q0WBPaR4OwEMkfW5i2q9j7GT_sEL8fPDYZ6C9Xoy-SERE6j_lo9q_iNRPZMg64HZZqIhCZ7iTctjkcY3aRMXa-bglgv1E7dy2mj5DH95b2KlnqHB1ZOvMx23riwR3ASv_ruCn1gJWKsTpLHU5pnzAUvDzYe-o4OLc4_4V5FuAEPmvKTGK237Rr87sRZhoSHCR40nAer_R58SDtCSRox0JF4Xxo4Ew18-CzBzoBA2PiKcxCLZmEElV4nO80K2GFgATCT0/4ql/3M-FzE_4Qqy0FmNnhlapvQ/h3/h001.Jgw0QjHKpBFj-VWFeWyR7ASGeqfZSfkitxFaO-rfYdo) Every dollar helps us reach more voters, recruit more volunteers, and build the kind of people-powered campaign that can take on corporate money and win.

Last week’s rally showed what is possible when people come together.

Now we have to turn that power into votes.

Let’s change the party — and then let’s change the country.

In solidarity,

Team Saikat

body:
Not long ago, this election turned on its head
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109403?t=6&akid=24353%2E878179%2E2AU9Qd) I owe you an explanation.

Not long ago, this election turned on its head. Donald Trump — who’s already officially endorsed my opponent — took it to the next level. He personally appeared at a Mar-a-Lago fundraiser for my opponent, wining and dining with some of the most extreme, far-right donors in the entire country. _And it worked._

That fundraiser was confirmation: **Pennsylvania is at the very top of the far-right’s wish list — and they’re willing to spend millions to try and take it for themselves.**

Here’s where our fundraising goals come in. You won’t see me traveling to Mar-a-Lago any time soon, schmoozing with Donald Trump. But elections take resources. And since those resources _definitely_ aren’t coming from Mar-a-Lago... I’m counting on this grassroots team to stand with me.

**Reaching our fundraising goal isn’t just a bonus for our campaign._It’s the whole damn strategy._** [So I need to ask: Will you make an investment of any size in our campaign and the Voter Protection Project before midnight tonight? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109403?t=7&akid=24353%2E878179%2E2AU9Qd) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Shapiro and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/109404?t=8&akid=24353%2E878179%2E2AU9Qd)

Thank you,

Josh Shapiro

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=24353%2E878179%2E2AU9Qd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=24353%2E878179%2E2AU9Qd).**

body:
Let’s keep the Dems’ radical agenda OUT of Florida
---

| | | | | **" House Pet."**

**" He lets white men pat him on the head."**

This is what so-called "tolerant & diverse" Democrats like Joy Reid are saying about me for being President Trump's STRONGEST ally.

It's Byron Donalds, and I have to say, I never expected them to be this desperate.

They've called me **" Fascist"** and **" White Supremacist"** before, but attacking me for the color of my skin is truly disgusting.

NOTHING makes them more outraged than seeing a Black man like me who loves his President & our country.

**I 'm a husband, a father, a Christian, and MAGA to the Bone.**

And I will NEVER submit to the attacks that they throw my way, and I will ALWAYS fight for you and every Patriot who loves our country as much as I do.

But what I'm about to admit to you isn't easy.

In fact, this is the most difficult message I've ever had to deliver:

Democrats are spending millions to flip Florida Blue, and if I can't hold the line, the rest of the country will follow.

Look - **all I 've had up to this point is you, President Trump, and the MAGA Movement. **

And the only way we'll win is by keeping MAGA STRONG, right here, right now.

So I'm humbly asking you to join me in sending an unforgettable message to every Democrat who thinks they can get under our skin.
---

---
| | | You know just as well as I do that Democrats are a relentless and unforgiving bunch.

They know Florida is the Freest State in the Nation, and stealing the Governorship could seriously hamper the MAGA Movement.

I've always been up-front with you... the fight ahead is going to be the most uphill battle of my life.

But I know with you and President Trump by my side - **we 'll secure the biggest win our country has ever seen.**

So please, will you join me today and help me deliver a HISTORIC victory for MAGA?

---

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We could be facing a lockout, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41332%2E3422442%2E-AEPcr)
Peter,
We’re officially **three weeks away** from the primary election, and here’s the truth: **if Katie doesn’t make it to the top two, Democrats could be _completely_ locked out of the general election in November.**
Californians could be left choosing between candidates backed by the same special interests that have made life harder and more expensive for working people.
**[If that’s all you need to hear, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help us reach more voters before they cast their ballots?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260512_3_ak.gZ9s7Z&refcode=em20260512-41332&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41332%2E3422442%2E-AEPcr)**
**Ballots are already landing in mailboxes, and voters are making decisions _right now_. That means every conversation, every ad, every organizing event, and every voter we reach over the next three weeks matters.**
Katie is fighting for real solutions—from single-payer health care and affordable housing, to universal child care and tuition-free public college.
While other campaigns rely on wealthy donors and backroom deals, Katie doesn’t answer to corporate PACs or billionaire donors.
Her campaign is powered by people who are tired of politicians protecting the wealthy while everyone else struggles to get by. Katie believes Californians deserve a leader who works for them—not for wealthy special interests.
**That means we depend on grassroots supporters stepping up in moments exactly like this one.**
**[We’ve got three weeks left to reach as many voters as possible before ballots are cast. If you’re ready to help Katie keep fighting for the California families politicians have left behind, chip in $5 or anything you can today. ››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260512_3_ak.gZ9s7Z&refcode=em20260512-41332&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41332%2E3422442%2E-AEPcr)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260512_3_ak.gZ9s7Z&refcode=em20260512-41332&t=23&akid=41332%2E3422442%2E-AEPcr)
—Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260512-41332&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=41332_3422442_-AEPcr&akid=41332%2E3422442%2E-AEPcr)**

clean_body: Peter, We’re officially three weeks away from the primary election, and here’s the truth: if Katie doesn’t make it to the top two, Democrats could be completely locked out of the general election in November. Californians could be left choosing between candidates backed by the same special interests that have made life harder and more expensive for working people. Ballots are already landing in mailboxes, and voters are making decisions right now. That means every conversation, every ad, every organizing event, and every voter we reach over the next three weeks matters. Katie is fighting for real solutions—from single-payer health care and affordable housing, to universal child care and tuition-free public college. While other campaigns rely on wealthy donors and backroom deals, Katie doesn’t answer to corporate PACs or billionaire donors. Her campaign is powered by people who are tired of politicians protecting the wealthy while everyone else struggles to get by. Katie believes Californians deserve a leader who works for them—not for wealthy special interests. That means we depend on grassroots supporters stepping up in moments exactly like this one. —Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: My opponent's shocking reversal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
If you didn’t see the news, my far-Left opponent, Angie Craig, just penned this despicable op-ed...

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgh7005jb8039fmbg5dddbb55esn6dhctpg7hcm0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0sdhmepj2c1h2bs)

Hi Friend, it's Michele...

I wish I could be writing a feel-good email to you today, but unfortunately, that's far from the case.

If you didn't see the news, my far-Left opponent, Angie Craig, just penned this despicable op-ed:
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr49iob3itsvnm3pkenfnuecnhcik0nr5mdprku8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0sdhmepj2c1h2bs)
The Laken Riley Act was a major bill that helps detain dangerous criminal illegal immigrants and remove them from our streets. It was passed by Republicans and Democrats. My opponent was immediately attacked by the far-Left - low and behold, she caved once again.

She was forced to retract her support and beg the far-Left for forgiveness. This is about as cynical as it gets. This flip-flop is a complete disgrace.

I think we all know it's painfully clear that the status quo won't cut it. Not anymore. That's why I threw my hat in the ring for the U.S. Senate. I'll ask the hard questions. I'll stand up to the powerful special interests. And I'll always stand by my principles - even if people attack me for it.

That's my commitment to you.

**[If you're sick and tired of these political sellouts, I encourage you to join my campaign today. There's no doubt in my mind that Angie Craig received a flood of donations after caving to the far-Left. I'll need your help to defeat these career politicians once and for all.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3psgnq7h3gdhf33i1shv0p2g2t7jnkvvhg8nkmg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0sdhmepj2c1h2bs)**

I will always stand by principle.
I will never betray my values for political gain.
And I will always be honest with you.

Please donate today. Help me keep fighting so we can take Minnesota off the board and deal a devastating blow to the political class.

Your generosity and commitment to this campaign have not gone unnoticed.

Thanks for all you do.

Be brave. Do good.
_- Michele_

name: The Flyover
subject: Inflation Rising, Nuclear Sub, and Leg Lifts on a Crane
body:
U.S consumer prices rose 3.8% from a year ago, topping economists' expectations and marking [the steepest single-month surge](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OqzAURldjOpBt7AsULl5Dl9dOiRz_hDu62Mg4Qdn9iBSzgak_6Xw65-u23CwSpsd_uwVTY15SOA8KtYayYIpkK-ZU8MD0SE9HwZbjeV8kl9By3Yp-8RbpvajGmxiCDH0TjBiGEQBGwZvVuGHSoCSMcOdO9FZ50WsbndLRalBTg-aicS16wTlo3k2TEF55ABtHcNExxYPHmkv3nTHVNUR651conctbQ2atdT9Y_4_Jmcn5PM_Opbu7RibnC83kzDWTs5BMzm7H9tertXtBaj823Vo3aorx-4lEeMDAFH9sFunzU_8U52XkTwAAAP__W6N2Dw) since May 2023.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0c2K20AMAOCnGd9iNL-ODz4EvIZCk0M30N7MeH5ilfHYzIyz7NsXpz32thcJ8QkhoZ_X8aoxYHzc9OK64tcxuo8cXCkujRh90AXXmDBjfMTdBKdT3qeRAVMnkCfKR6sxfI6isp13jjleuY42zVkpdaZQzZ2hTPNJtWcvJwnCC9tKIaSEpm2psazC7pgGknIKoCTUbUupFVYp7c_KeEMEOItlTfXvFWOZnQ-f69Ol2qxLFbq5lC0TfiFsIGzwUx11wafbdJmPDsKGZI9Qb_NG-JDREt4zkC1hatunoxAgG06YMvRFf7c53Yfbu8eUy4kDwMGM8P7InPD-UMLUXpYxr3syjvD-7dd9fLtevn3_B4uzuC__AaOXTeMjEt6_339cbn2VOrt9YAiYVUMEPBaN4XVg-dJXnh37EwAA___UDpj9) | |
# Wednesday, May 13, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1846, the U.S. Congress voted in favor of President James K. Polk's request to [declare war on Mexico](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6yAYxvGrwRsWXybJwHAWbzlrR4vAi_1WGCLAob77KlXvoPNPeh7p_3Ff7hYjpvW_3cG0kJcEvUZoDcqCKUTbMKeCFdOaDhfBlno8FsGEpmyiXC7eYjwXNXgTAATIAQy_XK5a6ytnw2aU9A8xCR7ASwDFpLsxp5gIfpJOKjugea-xiUvOmJ7YeLtx7pXX2oardsERxcBjy2X8zJjaBiGe-QVldHkfotlae1Yi_xExEzH33scNa8vlfDsRc9uwUm9Pion-ChHz3Z6USyLmo1KX01qgVurBRVug0m4LzYnu8IUuD8X4Z8cYseoLUWzdLcaf8_anYi8jvgMAAP__22CBlA) in an ongoing dispute over Texas. What's the secret to a long, happy life? The late Dr. Howard Tucker, named by Guinness as the oldest doctor ever, narrowed it down to [three rules](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu5CAQRE-Ds7YAGzwTEGzi7G-6ocWYZtyrNljAfMu3X_lfYdMq6anq_flavjwxpfdvv6NrMS8Jz8rYGpaFUmTfKKdCldI7fVZGX-rntWipLUgDaliCJ76WsQsuImocOnRqmh7W2oeS3eZi8NNDv7Qc5GC8eXolzfTU-BoDmmBMR-6mSaMGJaU1sn8-lQpjsNbHh13jKkaJgVou_d9MqW0Y-crfWPo17x27rbWjiuGX0LPQ83me_Zpe610KPd9ooWdphJ6VFHr2DZQc4LqPQOYAtEPbEM5cOPwkWBuEvLZcYL9ggPJhrBBzAQ-c0xs2fxwXMEUEXxAq7Qdjv7Wdu-LCcRIzVTuJUb53T_wzs_2X22-n_wUAAP__p3SNeg) in an essay he wrote just before his death. We're sharing them in _Wisdom Wednesday_ below. What's your own non-negotiable for a good life? Reply to let us know. ## US Inflation Rate Rises to 3-Year High
U.S consumer prices rose 3.8% from a year ago, topping economists' expectations and marking [the steepest single-month surge](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OqzAURldjOpBt7AsULl5Dl9dOiRz_hDu62Mg4Qdn9iBSzgak_6Xw65-u23CwSpsd_uwVTY15SOA8KtYayYIpkK-ZU8MD0SE9HwZbjeV8kl9By3Yp-8RbpvajGmxiCDH0TjBiGEQBGwZvVuGHSoCSMcOdO9FZ50WsbndLRalBTg-aicS16wTlo3k2TEF55ABtHcNExxYPHmkv3nTHVNUR651conctbQ2atdT9Y_4_Jmcn5PM_Opbu7RibnC83kzDWTs5BMzm7H9tertXtBaj823Vo3aorx-4lEeMDAFH9sFunzU_8U52XkTwAAAP__W6N2Dw) since May 2023. Prices rose 0.6% on a monthly basis, easing from March's 0.9% pace, as the Iran war continued pushing fuel and food costs higher, new government data showed Tuesday. [See the full breakdown here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GOxxARS0o0tht2pTOEx7rSxAcZNfZv8-4RX4g9Z05d875us03oEDx_gkbmuLTHPE8ApaCeaboAxRKMdNB8R4fNiDk47HMSijNRcdlMzug8JrbyhmPqLCp0Mi-H7TWgxTVaqD1uHg9gPdNC7aHbpCuV6MeR6d6O1RkLproZCOF0J2ox1FK1zqtwQ_aestagY5KyvV3olhW9OGVnphrm7YqmLWU_WDNB1MTU9N5nrWNi71GpqYLzdQkOqYmqZia_pz4khF-XDoj9ylz2DMF_vayO3G7Qi71WrZQZeP2k0KgQ_esFfcNKLyvy796PY36DQAA__-c-X5U). Core inflation, which excludes energy and food, [came in at 2.8% annually](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu3CAUheHV2N21AGNgCoo07l7alBYDF_tGGEaA58m7jyZFNpD-6OjX9-tr-3KUKO8_3Ym2x7Jl_G4Je8e6UY7JdSq5UqO858sndLVdz00woYAtwOctOEr3JsdgI6LAeUTLtTZKKcPZeFhhgpDPRc9SBIOLmtFEJiR65DqYBxvJft7YwmfOmFrY9HhwHmRQykWjfPSDZBiolzr9LpT7gTHd5Y118uUckz16f7Vh_jGIdRBrpOyyx-l2RymfxSBW9CWX8x7E6monn3AQqy-5XSdWeFXy2KBddccAswHK4F6VEsRaTnBwo6vg9gKh0hszPG_AjHW_4Z8PcL1o-Zi1mY5-prHa8PqmlKgpPUi2n47S39r-X8RvK_4EAAD__52IkgY) and 0.4% monthly, both above forecasts, suggesting price pressures are spreading beyond the pump. Airline fares soared 20.7% over the past year as rising jet fuel costs were passed directly to travelers, while beef prices climbed 14.8% annually.
## Pentagon Surfaces Secret Nuclear Sub
The Pentagon made a rare and deliberate disclosure Monday, [revealing the location](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQxfHT4M4RxmbABcU27rLtlhaBIZ7VGCIgiXL7VfYKX_2efsX_z3W_emLK99_-RNdT2TO-G2PvWHfKiX2nkis1yvf8DIy-tudtV1LBKPU4zXv0xJ99GaJLiArnAd1kjAUAO8nhcEZ7YxXMsErpV7mC9mG2CjXc5ggWB3JfTeppnqQELS_rOk1xiQA-WQgpiEVipF7q5W-h3A9M_CkvrJdQzoHd0fujifmXUJtQWz_wIObvJtT2KEzhI9QWMWFuKNSmrVFGLmM5qIyBfWvjSa0R49iet9NXyt_bUF18vImZGhixyPvp6b869B9lejn1LwAA___imHuB) of an Ohio-class nuclear-armed submarine in Gibraltar as a show of force toward Iran. Sub locations are typically classified. The Sixth Fleet [released an image](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ2RvYAhhYtr6HLtlWht1rB3xkS2E5S3P-Uv_hf469GMPs2f-3JHjpy233iQreFcEl0lUq2UF04hYuUzZS6ctvT0kTCXp1tAgZFqkLpbVuT4XvpmtYEIqGvI6nGcjDGTVs1uMbje37TqRjU6gJUGmLwbTND91CscG7afNTXoTitlBtXeblqv_WoMhsn44EWvaOV65vbvyanuFOL7fFFu_Xk00e61PorofgmYBczXdbWlZn5Q-eQCZpcx-Z2KgDnh6y1g_tZrATNnTHJjlzFWytJhjFwqe3lwKRxJlqc7MHMiiRHLP5SgTTeBGdu9HrHJdn1c_CmZUfRqO5Djl6z-6M6Xhf8BAAD__4ODiWQ) of the vessel docked at the British territory off Spain's southern coast. The Navy didn't officially name it, but ship watchers identified it as the USS _Alaska_ , which can carry Trident II missiles with a range exceeding 4,500 miles. The disclosure came a day after President Trump rejected Iran's latest peace offer as "totally unacceptable" and said the ceasefire was on "life support." The Pentagon is also weighing [renaming the war](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE8jdTT4Z0qvYJHG3UubUliRS3kDaimQ9BN8-0C-QroBPmAw3_z5Xr6BMvH2G3b0PZWF8WwZe8e6EKcMnQpXasQbv0JGqO21LlpqJ-RdKLNEoPxe7Bh9QtRoRvRqmmbn3Kzk-PS4uqTBoJ1WtyZrZqNUnJ2cwx3dtLqR_NUm78ooKd1d3r6-lIo2OgdpdiGFwUqM1Eu9_S3E_Ykpv8sP1lso-5j9s_ejDebXoB-DfpzneeM1XBYXH_TjKJk6hTboB39sIIuG4VWpvy-M3GErLELhRhEr8SYqCob9SlSBxQlVtIxxwyfsO1YREBomqihCyRmOJmpgMNY6I8fq43FSztTcNFi57UD5s7X_18E_Xv8LAAD__x8Sk60) "Operation Sledgehammer" if the ceasefire collapses and combat resumes.
## What a Gas Tax Cut Saves by State
President Trump said Monday he'd back [suspending the 18.4-cent federal gas tax](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAYBeCn0Q4DKIxTUGxjN9tuaRB-9N8gGPgd77z9jfcVbv0lJ-ecf6_5ZTFiWv_aHQyFPCe4agQiKDOmEC1hTgUrpjWdLoIt9VxmyaVmXDHRz95i_MxD600AkNC3YMTjMWqtR8HbzQglABbulFNej2rxEniQToanG2H0fYvmTuNK9IJzrXj3fArhB6-1DaN2wTUDB4-US_c_Y6INQvzkN5TO5b2NZiM6atP_aeTUyOm6ri4t7l5xeyOnI0ckdPXGDQnYls8KjZyonPvBqv1UVs_jyIVYPesByWNaWQAPxUa22srIfrHiku2HQY2qLcYfF8aIVT-aga-7xfhThn714NvI7wAAAP__GVyIUw) as the national average hit $4.50 a gallon, up more than 50% since the Iran war began. How much drivers would save from a gas tax cut depends on where they live. The average tax burden across all states is 51 cents per gallon, ranging from 5% of the pump price in Alaska to 17% in Illinois. [See a map of how much each state would save](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb_G7rAAA_YrKNK4e2lTWrMw2BNhbMHsOvv30eYXUl_p6pzz63v9BspUtp9woOd0rgXvlpEZ60olZWA6S6VGZSvPkBFqez5WLbUT0go1rhEov1fTR58QNY49ejVNs3NuVrLfvU1yRNBOJZzsbMFZNCombYyeHcy6J_95k1aNSkpn5fD1pVQ00TlIswspdEZiJD7r8Pukwjum_D5fWIdwHn32O_PVuvFHp5dOL_d9D-URPhafvdNLBAaxVbh2Cq3TS8KIFbLYoAmGP6ICo2gMjE1wfR6XoApF3FDFVSlgEwdcooYCozHWyL76eN2UMzU3dUZuB1D-x8L_FfDl9d8AAAD__zLzhmI). Even if every tax came off, gas would still cost about 35% more than before the war. Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., pledged legislation to suspend the federal tax. [Georgia is currently the only state](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OqzAURlcDnZF_sCGFi9fQ5bVTogu-JndkbGSbkOx-lNnC9J--o3O-7vMdKFDc_sOOtvo0R7xKwFoxzxR9gEopZioUt3iuASGXc5kll4ZxzYSaHVB4z33rrEeUqFq0YhhGY8woePuwRo09X_DmtB7EYrRZlBACcRy08lKMLdnPG9dCCc6N5t3tJoTrnTHgR7P6tek5Oqopd9-JYn2gD-_0xNytaW-DfdR6lEb9a-TUyOm6rs6nl4YaIFb4bBo5faQaOW2Y8kbANijsyLRiYR5CYBVe7ICzIHNU1rMUdKzmcz_abN1xUQhUzND0fNuBwi-3_inW08qfAAAA___kHX_e) with an active suspension of the state gas tax. That suspension expires on May 19.

Prices rose 0.6% on a monthly basis, easing from March's 0.9% pace, as the Iran war continued pushing fuel and food costs higher, new government data showed Tuesday. . Core inflation, which excludes energy and food, and 0.4% monthly, both above forecasts, suggesting price pressures are spreading beyond the pump. Airline fares soared 20.7% over the past year as rising jet fuel costs were passed directly to travelers, while beef prices climbed 14.8% annually. Pentagon Surfaces Secret Nuclear Sub The Pentagon made a rare and deliberate disclosure Monday, of an Ohio-class nuclear-armed submarine in Gibraltar as a show of force toward Iran. Sub locations are typically classified. The Sixth Fleet of the vessel docked at the British territory off Spain's southern coast. The Navy didn't officially name it, but ship watchers identified it as the USS Alaska , which can carry Trident II missiles with a range exceeding 4,500 miles. The disclosure came a day after President Trump rejected Iran's latest peace offer as "totally unacceptable" and said the ceasefire was on "life support." The Pentagon is also weighing "Operation Sledgehammer" if the ceasefire collapses and combat resumes. What a Gas Tax Cut Saves by State President Trump said Monday he'd back as the national average hit $4.50 a gallon, up more than 50% since the Iran war began. How much drivers would save from a gas tax cut depends on where they live. The average tax burden across all states is 51 cents per gallon, ranging from 5% of the pump price in Alaska to 17% in Illinois. . Even if every tax came off, gas would still cost about 35% more than before the war. Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., pledged legislation to suspend the federal tax. with an active suspension of the state gas tax. That suspension expires on May 19.
